Lilo & Stitch: Catch a Wave Across Disney Parks and Beyond

626 Day is here! Since the Walt Disney Animation Studios’ classic debuted in 2002, Lilo & Stitch has grown from a fan-favorite film into a global phenomenon, celebrated around the world at different Disney parks, a wide variety of merchandise, and even inspiring a spirited live-action film of the same name in 2025. 2026 Stitch Day Merch and Global Pop-Ups

The countdown to 626 Day is officially on! If you have not been following the latest intergalactic news, June 26 – aka 626 Day – is the fan-fueled holiday celebrating Disney’s Stitch, also known as Experiment 626.
